## 1. Project Overview

This project is a personally maintained, production-oriented RAG + MCP engineering codebase.

### Design Focus

- Reliability over demo complexity
- Modularity for provider and component replacement
- Clear observability and traceability across ingestion and query paths
- Regression-tested delivery with staged acceptance and full test runs

### Intended Use

- Internal knowledge retrieval services
- AI tool integration via MCP clients
- Iterative delivery in real business environments

### Non-goals

- General tutorial curriculum
- Interview-prep-centered project narrative
- Public teaching-first maintenance strategy
